title: Grandpa Pepe’s Thanksgiving Stuffing
content:
Grandpa Pepe’s Thanksgiving Stuffing

3 lbs of sausage meat with fennel seeds. If cand find add fennel as u cook

3 bags pepperidge farm cubed stuffing

3 1/2 lbs chopped sweet onions

2 celery stoukes

2 lbs mushrooms

Open the stuffing big bowl.

Add 2 32 ounce chicken broth. Mix well
In big fry pan cook the sausage. As u cook use spatula to chop the meat so dont stick
Take meat when cooked add to stuffing mix
Fry onions and chopped celery til soft add that
Cop mushrooms to 1 to 1 1/2 inch pieces fry that till cooked add to mixture
Mix well
Add about 1 cup locatelli cheese mix well
Dont add salt sausage very salty
You can add 4 eggs in morn before you cook. Holds together better
Dont have to though.
context: From document: Grandpa Pepe’s Thanksgiving Stuffing
